verses.text: Set apart three cities of refuge in the land. Refuge. Mercy is provided.
Set apart three cities of refuge in the land. Refuge. Mercy is provided.
Set apart three cities of refuge in the land. Refuge. Mercy is provided.
The unwitting slayer may flee there and live. The slayer. The innocent are sheltered.
The unwitting slayer may flee there and live. The slayer. The innocent are sheltered.
The unwitting slayer may flee there and live. The slayer. The innocent are sheltered.
The unwitting slayer may flee there and live. The slayer. The innocent are sheltered.
If the land enlarges, add three more cities. More refuge. Mercy expands.
If the land enlarges, add three more cities. More refuge. Mercy expands.
If the land enlarges, add three more cities. More refuge. Mercy expands.
But the murderer who hates shall be given to the avenger. Murder. Mercy shields not the guilty.
But the murderer who hates shall be given to the avenger. Murder. Mercy shields not the guilty.
But the murderer who hates shall be given to the avenger. Murder. Mercy shields not the guilty.
Remove not your neighbour's landmark. Landmark. Justice guards property.
One witness suffices not; the matter is searched out. Witnesses. Truth needs more than one voice.
One witness suffices not; the matter is searched out. Witnesses. Truth needs more than one voice.
One witness suffices not; the matter is searched out. Witnesses. Truth needs more than one voice.
One witness suffices not; the matter is searched out. Witnesses. Truth needs more than one voice.
A false witness bears the harm he sought; 'life for life.' Repaid. The liar reaps his own malice.
